ideation: This animation sequence depicts a pirate raising a flag.  The left arm will hold the flag aloft, while the right arm will remain at the side, ready for action.  The sequence will begin with the flag at the side, then raise it, hold it for a moment, and then lower it.  We'll use slight variations in wrist angles and shoulder rotations to convey a sense of energy and movement. The robot does not have hands, so the flag will appear to be held in the 'hand' region of the robot's arm.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, flag at the ready
left arm raises the flag high with a flourish
the flag waves proudly in the breeze
the flag is lowered back to the side
